titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 28: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 28. (A.R. No. 46 of 1910.) TIRUKKARUGĀVŪR, SIRKALI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall, central shrine, Madhuvanēsvara temple.

This records an endowment of 3 vēli of land (by the king) out of the total of 40 vēli of land in Tirukkarugāvūr as iṟaiyili on the occasion of Aippigai-vishu, at the request of Siṅgaṉ Kaliyaṉ alias Uttamaśōḻa-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Kommaipākkam. The total annual produce of 710 kalam of paddy from that land was specifically allotted for the various requirements of worship in the temple of Tirukkarugāvūr-Mahādēvar. This apportionment was made by a committee which was headed by Siṟṟiṅgaṇ uḍaiyāṉ Kōyil Mayilai alias Madhirāntaka-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ and which consisted of other officials, panmahēśvarar and mūlaparuḍai.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 130.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 5
āvatu tirukkarukāvūr mahaādevar Ittirukka
rukāvūr pottaka ttuva
5 nilam nāṟpatiṉ velikkiḻ I
Iṉilaṉ muveli muveliyum
uṭaiyār tiruvalañcuḻi śrīkoyi
vaittu Ayppikai viṣu saṅki
rānti yelvaiyiṟ tāṉañ ceyyā vi
k kommaipākkamuṭaiyāṉ ciṅkaṉ
kaliyaṉāṉa Uttamacoḻamuventaveḷāṉ viṇ
ṇappattāl yāṇṭu 5Āvatu mutal Iṟaiyiliyāka
kkuṭutta nilaṉ muveliyiṉā laṭaippaṭi nellu
Ūṟkālāl Eḻunūṟṟorupatiṉ kalamum Atikārikaḷ
ṟṟiṅkaṇ Uṭaiyāṉ koyilmayilaiyāṉa matirān
takamuventaveḷāṉum cāttāṉ pacuvatiyāṉa kaliya
n taṇṭeśvaraṉum panmāheśvararum mulaparuṭai
rum Āḷvārkku veṇṭu nivanta maṭaittapaṭi Ā
Amitu ceyya nittaṅkuṟuṇi nāṉāḻi yariciyuṅ kuṟu
yuṭpaṭa nittanellu tūṇiyāka Orāṭṭaikku
nellu ḷakku pattiṉu
kku nittam nellu Iru ṭai nā
ḷaikku nellu muṉṉūṟṟukku viḷakke
ṇṇaikku nellu pati pā riruvark
ku kappaṭa mutaluṭpaṭa Orāṭṭaikku nellu Eḻupatiṉ ka
lam tiruccantaṇam nicatam Oru palamāka Orāṭṭaikku ne
llu muppatiṉkalaṅ kuṅkiliyattukku Orāṭṭaikku
nellu patiṉ kalaṅ karumāṇikkatevarkku tiruvamirtukku
nicatam nellu patakkāka Orāṭṭaikku nellu Aṟupa
tiṉ kala mittevarkku nontāviḷak koṉṟiṉukku nel
lu muppatiṉ kalaṅ kaṇavatiyār mirtukku nitta ne
llu Aññāḻiyāka Orāṭṭaikku nellu patiṉeṉ kalaṉe yi
ru tūṇikkuṟuṇi Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 28 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
